messages.content: 翻译为英文：太阳升起来了，天亮了。鸟儿在树上唱歌，花儿开放。
The sun has risen, it is bright. Birds sing in the trees, flowers bloom.
Translate to Chinese: The sun has risen, it is bright. Birds sing in the trees, flowers bloom.
太阳升起来了，天亮了。鸟儿在树上唱歌，花儿开放。
翻译为英文：山很高，水很清。风吹过草地，牛羊在吃草。
The mountains are high, the water is clear. Wind blows across the grass, cattle and sheep graze.
Translate to Chinese: The mountains are high, the water is clear. Wind blows across the grass, cattle and sheep graze.
山很高，水很清。风吹过草地，牛羊在吃草。
翻译为英文：天上有很多星星。月亮很圆，照亮了大地。
There are many stars in the sky. The moon is round, illuminating the earth.
Translate to Chinese: There are many stars in the sky. The moon is round, illuminating the earth.
天上有很多星星。月亮很圆，照亮了大地。
翻译为英文：今天我去集市买了米和盐。回家的路上遇到了老朋友。
Today I went to the market and bought rice and salt. I met an old friend on the way home.
Translate to Chinese: Today I went to the market and bought rice and salt. I met an old friend on the way home.
今天我去集市买了米和盐。回家的路上遇到了老朋友。
翻译为英文：孩子们在院子里玩耍。老人坐在门口晒太阳。
Children play in the courtyard. The elderly sit at the door enjoying the sun.
Translate to Chinese: Children play in the courtyard. The elderly sit at the door enjoying the sun.
孩子们在院子里玩耍。老人坐在门口晒太阳。
翻译为英文：做饭需要水和火。我们用木柴生火，用锅煮饭。
Cooking needs water and fire. We use wood to make fire, and pots to cook rice.
Translate to Chinese: Cooking needs water and fire. We use wood to make fire, and pots to cook rice.
做饭需要水和火。我们用木柴生火，用锅煮饭。
翻译为英文：彝族有古老的文字和丰富的文化。火把节是最重要的节日。
The Yi people have ancient writing and rich culture. The Torch Festival is the most important holiday.
Translate to Chinese: The Yi people have ancient writing and rich culture. The Torch Festival is the most important holiday.
彝族有古老的文字和丰富的文化。火把节是最重要的节日。
翻译为英文：老人说：勤劳的人不会挨饿。知足的人常常快乐。
The elder said: Hard-working people will not go hungry. Contented people are often happy.
Translate to Chinese: The elder said: Hard-working people will not go hungry. Contented people are often happy.
老人说：勤劳的人不会挨饿。知足的人常常快乐。
翻译为英文：唱歌和跳舞是彝族人民最喜爱的活动。
Singing and dancing are the favorite activities of the Yi people.
Translate to Chinese: Singing and dancing are the favorite activities of the Yi people.
唱歌和跳舞是彝族人民最喜爱的活动。
翻译为英文：天地之间，万物生长。水往低处流，人往高处走。
Between heaven and earth, all things grow. Water flows downward, people strive upward.
Translate to Chinese: Between heaven and earth, all things grow. Water flows downward, people strive upward.
天地之间，万物生长。水往低处流，人往高处走。
翻译为英文：道法自然，万物归一。心静则万物静，心动则万物动。
The Way follows nature, all things return to one. When the mind is still, all is still; when the mind moves, all moves.
Translate to Chinese: The Way follows nature, all things return to one. When the mind is still, all is still; when the mind moves, all moves.
道法自然，万物归一。心静则万物静，心动则万物动。
翻译为英文：学而不思则罔，思而不学则殆。知识改变命运。
Learning without thinking is useless; thinking without learning is dangerous. Knowledge changes destiny.
Translate to Chinese: Learning without thinking is useless; thinking without learning is dangerous. Knowledge changes destiny.
学而不思则罔，思而不学则殆。知识改变命运。
